arts.ttl: García Pimienta says Sevilla will have to ‘enjoy defending’ vs Barca
arts.sum: Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 21 games against Sevilla at home, a record García Pimienta wants to end this weekend. Sevilla boss Francisco Javier García Pimienta has said his team will have to “enjoy defending” if they are to win at Barcelona ahead of Sunday’s clash between the two teams .

arts.ttl: Barca told why Szczesny was ‘destined’ to play for club
arts.sum: Jacek Rutkowski has told AS that Szczęsny was “destined” to play for Barcelona and has always loved the club. Szczesny has always admired Barcelona since he started playing football.

arts.ttl: Erik on development of Alvaro Fernandez
arts.sum: If you think: 'I have to win every game' and as a team we have to match the standards to win every game, you get there where you have to be because they are the expectations Sir Alex set for this club. “In this moment, we can't match the standards he [Sir Alex] set but still we won trophies.

arts.ttl: Barcelona chief confirms talks to extend contracts of 3 players
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta has confirmed that the club are actively working to tie three members of the club’s first-team squad down to new contracts. The trio in question? Pedri,…

arts.ttl: Injured Barcelona star to be rewarded for return with new contract
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi will see his imminent return to the pitch followed swiftly by a contract extension offer on the part of the Blaugrana. That’s according to Fabrizio Romano, who…
The powers that be at La Liga giants Barcelona have long identified Manchester City star Erling Haaland as the club’s ‘dream’ signing. That’s according to transfer insider Florian Plettenberg, who…

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barcelona take on Sevilla
arts.sum: -Been voted into the LaLiga team of the season with Sevilla and Barcelona @ScoutLaLiga on Koundé: https://t.co/bUIC2RdHtN pic.twitter.com/brbPJd59VO The Frenchman has been an absolute star for Barcelona so far this season and looks set to start once again despite playing 90 minutes twice for France over the international break.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent firm transfer warning amid Karim Adeyemi, Omar Marmoush, Alvaro Fernandez links
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch comments on the Reds' prospects of pulling off transfer deals for Karim Adeyemi, Omar Marmoush and Alvaro Fernandez in 2025.
